research.report.auto.title: Deep Research Word Report
research.report.auto.description: CTOX selects the appropriate report type and creates a solid Word document.

research.report.feasibility_study.title: Feasibility Study
research.report.feasibility_study.description: Decision-grade feasibility study with evidence, evaluation, and DOCX rendering.

research.report.market_research.title: Market Analysis
research.report.market_research.description: Market size, segments, drivers, competition, barriers, and recommendation.

research.report.competitive_analysis.title: Competitive Analysis
research.report.competitive_analysis.description: Competitor set, evaluation axes, matrix, positioning, gaps, and recommendation.

research.report.technology_screening.title: Technology Screening
research.report.technology_screening.description: Inventory of options, criteria, shortlist, and next steps.

research.report.whitepaper.title: Whitepaper
research.report.whitepaper.description: Thesis, context, arguments, counter-arguments, implications, and position.

research.report.literature_review.title: Literature Review
research.report.literature_review.description: Literature review with topics, synthesis, gaps, and open questions.

research.report.decision_brief.title: Decision Memo
research.report.decision_brief.description: Short recommendation-oriented memo with options, criteria, and evaluation.

research.report.project_description.title: Project Description / Funding Project
research.report.project_description.description: Company and project description for innovation and funding projects.

research.report.source_review.title: Source Review
research.report.source_review.description: Systematic source and data source research with taxonomy and priorization.

document.summarize.title: Summarize
document.summarize.description: Summarize the selected DOCX in a structured format.

document.extract-requirements.title: Extract Requirements
document.extract-requirements.description: Extract requirements, open issues, and evidence.

document.review-risks.title: Review Risks
document.review-risks.description: Review technical, legal, and implementation risks in the document.
